entry.title: Re: CloudEvents at SAP 🌁
entry.content: @jravnik @MMonis standalone SAP Event Mesh is not available in BTPEA contracts, hence why you can't find it in the SAP Discovery Center. That said, there is a new Event Mesh capability in SAP Integration Suite - https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/meet-your-new-friend-emis-event-mesh-in-sap-integration-suite/ba-p/13731129. You can find more details in that blog post and you can also join the live stream scheduled for Wednesday - https://www.youtube.com/live/tUIG34xT3oo - to learn more.

entry.title: Re: How to get started in Career Corner?
entry.content:
MiSu... Please check out the SAP Career site for jobs in CEE/MEE/DACH including Czech Republic. These are with SAP only... there are other job boards for SAP customers and partners.

I like the description at the top of this area on how to get started. Career Corner is a place to "explore different paths and learn from and with like-minded members, connect with them, and find out more about open positions in the SAP ecosystem. Career Corner is a space where you can ask your peers for career advice, share certification recommendations, and interview guidance."

Wishing you the very best in the next steps of your job and career journey!

entry.title: Develop an application utilizing the RAP Web API with SAP Build Apps framework in S4Hana OnPremise
entry.content:
In this blog it will be shown how SAP Restful Application Programming Model can be used and consumed in SAP Build App to create an APP.

Technology used:

  1. SAP RAP
  2. SAP Build Apps
  3. SAP BTP

 

Development Steps:

    1.  Create RAP Model objects in Managed scenario.

  •  Database Table
  • Interface View
  • Transactional View
  • Consumption View
  • Transactional Behavior Definition
  • Consumption Behavior Definition
  • Service Definition
  • Service Binding

 

     2. The Service Binding should be published as Web API.

   3. Create a Destination .

 

 

    4. Create A SAP App in SAP Build Apps using the RAP service.

       

        5. Home Page to Display list of records.

           

         6. Update Page to Create New Records.

 

Test :

  1. Open the APP in Preview Mode. It will display all the existing records in the Table using RAP service.

 

 

      2. After click ‘Create New Student’ button Update page will open. Create a New Record.

                  

       3. After Create button clicked. New record will be created using RAP Post service.

 

     4. You can also see the data in ADT Data Preview .

 

 

 

This blog summarizes how to utilize RAP services within SAP Build Apps, detailing necessary configurations in SAP BTP.

entry.title: Re: Posting Material document via SAP Build
entry.content:
I'm not an expert on this or most S/4HANA APIs. Generally, I simply run the API and use any error messages to figure out what properties are required. Did you call the API, and if so, what was returned?

You can get additional info from either the SAP Business Accelerator Hub (which you referenced above) or the documentation, like here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/eb2a39dd0c124fed8252f684002d55e1/d4c919581bc30a02e10000000a44147b.html

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Apps QR Code generation issue on mobile device

entry.title: Freestype UI5 & with OData V4 - Select control in table line item
entry.content:
Hi experts,

I'm experimenting with a Freestyle UI5 App and a CAP ODataV4 service.

My table's line items are bound to the TaskSet entity. One of the columns features a dropdown list using the sap.m.Select control, and the dropdown list items are bound to the TaskStatusSet entity:

The selected table line item value is displayed accurately:

When I attempt to change the value, the batch request is triggered to the TaskStatusSet entity instead of the TaskSet entity:

My CAP Model:

What am I doing wrong? How can I update the correct entity?

 

Thanks in advance.

Best regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 1 - Setup
entry.content:
In [5]: %sql hana://userkey=myDevChallenger

In [6]: %sql SELECT Current_User FROM DUMMY
* hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
Done.
Out[6]: [('DEVCHALLENGER',)]

In [7]: %sql hana://userkey=mydbadmin

In [8]: %sql
...: hana_db_info = %sql SELECT "KEY", "VALUE" FROM "M_HOST_INFORMATION" WHERE "KEY" IN ('build_cloud_edition', 'start_time')
hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
* hana://userkey=mydbadmin
hana://userkey=myDevChallenger
* hana://userkey=mydbadmin
Done.

In [9]: type
Out[9]: type

In [10]: type(hana_db_info)
Out[10]: sql.run.ResultSet

In [11]: hana_db_info.DataFrame()
Out[11]:
key value
0 build_cloud_edition 2024.2.16
1 start_time 2024-06-16 09:19:51.482

In [12]: print("That's the end of the setup exercise!")
That's the end of the setup exercise!

In [13]: quit

entry.title: Automatic Batch determination after outbound delivery created
entry.content:
Hi all, I meet some problems for auto batch determination. For MTO business when I create outbound delivery at first, then having batch info and prepare PGI, the auto batch determination doesn't work. and I have to click batch split and manually do the batch determination. However if we have stocks at first, and create outbound delivery, the batch can be auto determinate. I do not know which elements effect the time for auto batch determination.

Also I have same problem for STO business. because we did some setting about auto-create STO delivery note creation as the same time as  IC PO creating. And we met the same question for auto batch determination do not work. If we delete this DN and create DN one more time, the DN will get the auto batch determination.

could anyone tell me which configuration effect this auto batch determination ?

entry.title: How to enhance idoc message type BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M
entry.content:
Dear colleagues,
We would like to extend the message type BUPA_INBOUND_MAIN_SAVE_M with custom segments, and enhance the outbound processing to fill the custom fields.
We have previous experiences with message types DEBMAS and CREMAS, and the corresponding BADIs (CUSTOMER_ADD_DATA_BI, VENDOR_ADD_DATA_BI...), what's the equivalent BADI or SAP enhancement for BUPA idoc?
Thanks in advance,
Luis.

entry.title: Re: ABAP Debugger Scripting: Basics
entry.content:
This blog was referenced in a recent SAP-Note "3415810 - New ABAP Debugger Script RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION" introducing a new Debugger Script "RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION" ...
Extract :
"This note implements the ABAP Debugger Script RSTPDA_SCRIPT_MODIFICATION. This script can be used in the ABAP debugger to find note implementations, third-party programs, user exits, BAdI implementations, customer modifications or similar to analyse them. This script can be used by SAP Support and by customers who are experts regarding ABAP Debugger Scripting. If you are not familiar with ABAP Debugger Scripting, you can find information in the documentation and in this blog."

This seems like a very interesting addition to the Debugger Scripts ...

Nic T.

entry.title: Re: what is the best way to represent equipment that is at client plant ?
entry.content: The equipment can have partner functions like sold-to, Ship-to etc. This can clearly indicate where the equipment is located and owned. Adding a functional location is a additional burden that has to be carried if that part of the technical object structuring is used.

entry.title: Re: Welcome to the beginner corner!
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

I identify as a person in the below category:

 

  • People who are physically disabled or neurodivergent

 

I really love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to develop my skill set with the SAP platform to hopefully be in a position where I can utilize my training to give back to others in the future.

 My Mom had a stroke 5 years ago, and I dedicated my life to taking care of her. My Mom passed away last year, and the 5 year employment gap that I have from taking care of my Mom is making it difficult to re-enter the workforce because the employers view the 5 year gap as an indicator that my skills are not current. I am very appreciative of the opportunity that the digital skills initiative provides because I am hopeful that it will enable me to prove to the interviewers that I have the current and valuable skills to successfully contribute to the job force. 

I believe it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I am grateful for the digital skills initiative opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the digital skills initiative.

Sincerely,

Mike Bretz

entry.title: Re: SAP ASE TLS 1.3 support
entry.content:
There has been no change since then; the CR is still open in engineering.  
The KBA is the primary source of information that would be updated when the CR is closed.
The CR would also start appearing in the "Targeted  CR List for  ASE <patch level>" KBA(s) for the patches  it was implemented in, and in the cover letters for those patches.

Cheers,
-bret

entry.title: Re: ABAP Cloud Developer Trial 2022 Available Now
entry.content:
Hi @julieplummer20, 

Something to look at in the next version: Please could you ensure the system profile is consistent with RZ10? 

If I edit the profile in RZ10 there are a bunch of errors and if I generate and save a new version the system will no longer start. It has nothing to do with my changes, as it works fine if I restore the previous .PFL files and directly add my changes in there.

(For what it's worth, I changed the auto logout time and added the icm hostname as some webpages could not be launched from SAPGUI due to missing FQDN - icm/host_name_full = vhcala4hci.dummy.nodomain ).

entry.title: Guide in a needed middleware integration with SAP
entry.content:
Hello community. 

I've been hired as consultant to generate an integration solution middleware for the following need. I'll try to be the most descripitive below: 

My hiring customer has a fintech platform for financial intermediation. One side of their business are the banks and other financial institutions. In the other side, business owners which run SAP (and other ERP systems) in different environments and flavours. My job is to manage a project to produce and deliver in name of my customer, a module, connector, add-on or whatever name implies, for SAP, with the following characteristics: 

  • Confirm online a vendor invoice in business owners SAP ERPs from my customer platform. 
  • Flag the invoice with specific business case data (in case confirmed).
  • Send to my customer platform specific data in some state changed (invoice canceled, deleted, values updated, payment applied, and others). 
  • Show in SAP, in some specific screen or tab the flagging information received from my customer platform

As a new guy to SAP world, I've been researching and got to the point of determining that this can be done technically  either with NetWeaver PI or the C# RFC Connector, and using some trial versions of ABAP Servers. However, I'm lost to the specifics. So, can you please help me out with this inquiries: 


  1. What is the best combination of SAP tools to produce a secure (however private) Internet Facing API that acts a middleware between my customer platform and business owners app. 
  2. Recommended code tool to generate the additional screen or information of flagged invoices for business owners' SAP Users. 
  3. Recommended trial or development SAP servers/platform available for developing and testing purposes. In this case, I'd like to know specifically if there is any version, or in default some way of loading demo data in the environments. Cloud could work, but we prefer local on premises if its available.

Thanks in advance, any other needed info I'm open to answer.

entry.content:

Question if I may ask - if a client is on S/4HANA On-Prem 2021 release, and wish to implement eInvoicing to align with ZUGFeRD, do they need S/4HANA DRC Public Edition subscription and connect their On-Prem system with it via cloud connector? This is the common mechanism described for other EU countries, e.g.; The Netherlands, France, with corresponding implementation notes; I assume same mechanism applies to Germany but can't be sure. Any guidance pls?

Kr, Debashish.
